name: Shreyash Gupta
education: Master's Degree, Information Technology and Management from Naveen Jindal School of Management, UT Dallas; Bachelor’s Degree, Information and Communication Technology from Dhirubhai Ambani University
headline: Senior Software Engineer at Microsoft
about: Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years at Microsoft and Amazon, specializing in distributed systems, cloud modernization, and security/compliance at scale. I’ve led initiatives to modernize legacy platforms into workflow-driven architectures, strengthen data security to meet FedRAMP standards, and design systems that saved millions in cost and enabled $1M+ annual revenue growth. Passionate about building reliable, scalable platforms and driving cross-org alignment to deliver impact for both customers and business.

experiences.title: Data Analyst Intern
experiences.jobDescription:
- Segmentation of Marketing Database and making meaningful interpretations across three different platforms: Oracle Eloqua, Model N and XML tree of Atmel Products
- Analysis of key effectiveness metrics related to marketing programs and traffic sources using statistical models
- Automating the Flow of potential customer journey from Lead to Opportunity
- Writing SQL/T-SQL queries to Create, Update and Insert new records
- Used SQL/T-SQL and C# to clean unstructured data from Eloqua and XML
- Wrote SQL queries to identify product URLs and related document and tools URLs to make connection in Neo-4j Database
- Automating segregation of new opportunities from existing opportunities using SQL, C# .Net and Neo4j for Graph Database as backbone.
- Preparing various reports and optimizing the gathering and leveraging of engagement data.
- Generation of Monthly management reports
- Proved that my methods can increase the ROI by 15-20% annually for Atmel Corporation

experiences.title: Technical Consultant
experiences.jobDescription:
Part of team responsible for implementation of high performance contact center for one of the world's largest bio-metric identification project (UIDAI) by Govt. of India.
Key Responsibilities Included: 
- Client Interaction and collation of business requirements and translating them into functional specifications and detailed test plans for MSCRM.
- Supported the team throughout the lifecycle of the project using AGILE and Waterfall SDLC methodologies.
- Requirement Gathering and Documentation in form of BRD (Business requirement document) and RFPs.
- Timely Updation of RFP and maintaining versions of SRS and BRD as per the changes expected in the system
- Worked on issue resolution and performed system integration testing.
- Created end-to-end system flow test cases and provided support to QA and testing team for end to end implementation of the same.
- Lead of 3 successfull User Acceptance Test. 
- Performed GAP analysis to eventually reduce rework by 25%
- Participated in Business development meetings and proposed new approach ideas to reduce SLA time by 30%
- Layed down the template for system user guide and supported the team in completing them for each role in the system
- Extending CRM features through plug-ins, Java Scripts, Workflows and API's as per client Requirement using C# .Net
- Managing CRM SQL Database and running complex queries for custom and SSRS reports for daily, weekly and monthly performance.
- Analyzed the reports with team lead and Manager to improve query performance as well as user approach for the system to effectively improve the performance of the overall system 
- Provided training to more than 150 users at two of the biggest client locations Pune and Jamshedpur

experiences.title: Associate Software Engineer Intern
experiences.jobDescription:
Part of team handling Govt. of Gujarat project called E-Gram. Handled end-to-end development of online application to track the daily activities and presence of Govt. employees in villages appointed to help rural population with forms and govt. procedures:
- Determined requirements by field visits and by working with the end customers
- Forms creation for modules part of the application
- Documented and Designed database normalized to 3NF form
- Implemented database in PL/SQL to handle reports as well as information from the forms
- Extensive use of bulk collection in PL/SQL objects for improving performance 
- Outlined the reports format and wrote stored procedures for weekly and monthly reports
- Developed web application and forms using PHP MVC framework with the team using AGILE methodlogy and shadowed Senior Manager to track project progress
- Handled errors using exception handling extensively for the ease of debugging and displaying appropriate error messages
- Guided the end users (Govt. Officials) through the entire UAT process

experiences.title: Associate Intern
experiences.jobDescription:
Part of team responsible for development and support of application called IWDMS for various State Governments of India. The application was implemented in JAVA with PL/SQL as database. 
Key Responsibilities :
- Maintain existing database and run existing PL/SQL queries for weekly reports
- Optimized existing reports and internal queries to reduce the execution time by 15 sec
- Made changes to the existing documentation as per the client request
- Exposed to development of application in JAVA for 2 of the states (Orissa and Maharashtra)
- Shadowed and helped in design of database for application tailored to needs of Orissa and Maharashtra 
- Closed change request in the internal IWDMS reporting system

volunteerAndAwards.description: Facilitated small Self-Help Groups in remote area's of Bangalore to help people start their own business in order to become independent and grow out of poverty. Took active participation in their group meetings to understand the basic needs that one wishes to fulfill. Helped in keeping records of loans within the groups.

recommendationsReceived.name: Akhila Aiyer
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Architecting AI solutions that advance the way we live and work
recommendationsReceived.description: Detail oriented and analytical, Shreyash carefully and methodically plowed  his way through a great deal of unorganized data to surface some valuable business insights for marketing and sales. Shreyash would be a valuable asset to any group or team looking to add analytical skills, I highly recommend him.

recommendationsReceived.name: Sander Arts
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Venture Advisor | CMO | Board Member | Author | Investor
recommendationsReceived.context: Sander was senior to Shreyash but didn't manage Shreyash directly
recommendationsReceived.description: So, where to start? Shreyash walked into Atmel, started putting his head down and looked at 'some data'....he then came and presented in my MT and blew everybody away with the project, the process, and the results which helped marketing and sales collaborate and get more ROI. I'd recommend him to anyone who wants to get more out of their data and use Shreyash's brain and communication / biz skills to have those insights make an impact on the sales side.

recommendationsReceived.name: Ahmad S.
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Senior Manager driving growth through cloud technology
recommendationsReceived.description:
I worked closely with Shreyash at several consultancy related projects during my stint with HCL - UIDAI. Shreyash appeared to be extremely dedicated person, taking his part seriously and responsibly. He never refused to take a lead and present our team solutions to external clients. 

I would highly recommend Shreyash for a variety of roles within consultancy and industry areas. He is able to successfully contribute a team focused approach and professional knowledge to any project.

Wish him all the best for future.

recommendationsReceived.name: SUDHEER MIRAMPALLY
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Dynamics 365 Practice Head | Guiding Digital Transformation in CRM, IT Strategy, and Agile Leadership | PMP, TOGAF & Microsoft Certified Professional
recommendationsReceived.context: SUDHEER was senior to Shreyash but didn't manage Shreyash directly
recommendationsReceived.description: Shreyash is great team player excellent to work with him, very knowledgeable and has exceptional communication skills and well versed with Microsoft Dynamics CRM and .net technologies. one good thing in Shreyash is he always accepts the new challenges and proves in it with his quick grasping power, he is good analyzer and we worked together in HCL and wish to work with him always... all the best Shreyash... you are a champ :)

recommendations.name: Puneet Wadhawan
recommendations.subtitle: Dynamics 365, Azure, SSIS, SSRS .Net,
recommendations.context: Shreyash worked with Puneet on the same team
recommendations.description: I have worked with Puneet for around 2 years. During those 2 years, I found Puneet to be impeccable in his approach to solving complex problems. He is very dedicated and shows great curiosity when it comes to learning new things no matter how difficult they seem. He is very methodological in his approach while handling clients as well as while mentoring his fellow colleagues. I would highly recommend having Puneet in the team.

summary: Shreyash Gupta is currently a Senior Software Development Engineer at Microsoft, joining a mature, enterprise-stage technology organization. His posts frequently center on HR technology, talent science, AI-driven assessment, inclusion for people with disabilities, recruiting, and career development. His style is upbeat, promotional and community-oriented—mixing personal career updates (e.g., referrals), event promotion, and advocacy for practical, ethical AI use-cases rather than deep technical tutorials. He signals expertise at the intersection of software engineering and HR tech by highlighting tools and customer stories (Infor Talent Science, Foot Locker, Mass Rehab Commission) that demonstrate real-world impact. He consistently drives engagement by inviting direct messages, promoting booth visits at conferences, and using hashtags and event details to mobilize networks. Overall, he positions himself as a connector between engineering, product and HR stakeholders, emphasizing inclusive AI solutions and customer-focused outcomes.
